pr.title: Record: SLOT-32 + Partial Depth Recurrence — val_bpb 0.7736 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: SLOT-32 delta tuning with 32 AdamW steps at LR 0.015 and conditioned partial depth recurrence repeating layers 4-5 to mimic a 13-layer network.
techniques: 32-step SLOT delta tuning with cosine decay and stride-96 eval masking
Partial depth recurrence repeating layers 4 and 5 with iter_embed/iter_gate conditioning
Late QAT followed by int6+LZMA compression
